About.WhoAmIDescription: Hi! I am a software engineer with a passion for web development and game design. I created this memory game as a project to improve my skills and offer a fun experience. I hope you enjoy playing it as much as I enjoyed creating it!
About.SourceCodeDescription: If you are interested in the source code, you can find it on my GitHub repository. Feel free to take a look, contribute, or use it as a reference.
About.ConnectDescription: I would love to connect with you and receive feedback on the game!

Home.WhatIsItText:
A simple and effective website that allows you to train your brain and mind, tracking your stats and performance over time. The game is simple: you have to find pairs of cards with the same image.
Good luck and have fun!
Home.WhyNatureText: The images used in this game are all related to nature. Nature is a great source of inspiration and beauty, capable of creating a relaxing and pleasant atmosphere during the game. Furthermore, nature-themed images are visually stimulating and can help improve memory retention.
Home.WhereFromTitle: Where do these images come from?
Home.WhereFromText: The images used come from Unsplash, a site that provides high-quality photography without copyright. You can find more information about the images and their authors directly on the Unsplash website.
Home.LoadMoreText: Look at these beautiful images. We have {{numberOfImages}} available!

Play.DifficultyDescription: Every great story begins with a choice. Select the challenge level and prove you have an award-winning memory.
Play.ChooseWisely: Choose wisely: a challenge that's too simple doesn't strengthen the memory, one that's too hard might confuse you.
Play.LoginWarning: You are not logged in, progress will not be saved.
Play.CompletedMessage: You completed the challenge in {{moves}} moves!
Play.PlayInstructions: All cards are face down. Click on a card to flip it and look for its match. If you fail, they will turn back face down: memorize their position!

Loading.Title: Preparing levels
Loading.Text: We are preparing the available challenges. Choose the one that suits you best!

Error.Title: Oops! Something went wrong
Error.Text: Unable to retrieve difficulties from server. Check your connection and try again.
